query:
SELECT 
  t.name AS time_nome,
  t.lodge AS time_loja,
  p.name AS jogador_nome,
  p.position AS posicao,
  p.number AS numero
FROM teams t
LEFT JOIN players p ON p.team_id = t.id
WHERE t.campaign_id = (SELECT id FROM campaigns WHERE slug = 'futebolfraterno2026')
ORDER BY t.name, p.name;
